title: Velvety Lazy-Sunday Oat Stir-fry
description: This fermented, velvety, lazy-sunday Norwegian dish features oat milk in a low-carb-friendly stir-fry that can be prepared quickly and easily.

ingredients.name: cucumber
ingredients.amount: half of a small cucumber, diced

instructions: Preheat your pan over medium heat.
Drizzle some oat milk into the pan and let it slightly thicken without boiling.
Add sliced green onion to the pan, stirring occasionally until fragrant.
Fold in finely chopped ginger and julienned carrots. Continue cooking until they are almost tender.
Toss in diced cucumber and red pepper flakes (if using).
Stir-fry for about 2 minutes or until all vegetables are heated through and have absorbed the oat milk flavor.
Garnish with additional green onions if desired and serve immediately.
